title: Atlas Expansion XII: Domains 736-765 (Special Functions & Combinatorics)

D737.name: Riemann zeta ζ(s)
D737.reason: ζ(s) = Σn^{-s}: analytic continuation, functional eq = EML-3

D740.name: Hypergeometric functions _2F_1
D740.reason: Euler integral with complex parameter = EML-3

D741.name: Elliptic integrals K(k), E(k)
D741.reason: Period integrals of elliptic curves = EML-3

D742.name: Theta functions ϑ(z,τ)
D742.reason: ϑ(z,τ) = Σ exp(πin²τ+2πinz): complex oscillatory = EML-3

D743.name: Modular forms f(τ)
D743.reason: f(τ) = Σ a_n exp(2πinτ): EML-3 complex oscillatory

D746.name: Polylogarithm Li_s(z)
D746.reason: Li_s(z) = Σ z^k/k^s: complex analytic = EML-3

D748.name: Airy functions Ai(z), Bi(z)
D748.reason: Ai(z) = integral of exp(it³/3+itz): complex oscillatory = EML-3

D751.name: Enumerative combinatorics (generating functions)
D751.reason: F(x) = Σ a_n x^n: EML-1 (exp generating functions)

D753.name: Topological combinatorics (Lovász)
D753.reason: Chromatic number via topology; real Betti numbers = EML-2

D755.name: Ramsey theory
D755.reason: R(k,k) bounds: tower of 2s; non-constructive = EML-∞

D756.name: Extremal combinatorics (Turán)
D756.reason: Turán number ex(n,F); real density = EML-2

D757.name: Analytic combinatorics (Flajolet-Sedgewick)
D757.reason: Singularity analysis; complex transfer theorems = EML-3

D758.name: Combinatorial species (Joyal)
D758.reason: Functors from Fin to Set; purely structural = EML-0

D759.name: Graph coloring (chromatic polynomial)
D759.reason: P(G,k) = polynomial in k; real = EML-2

summary.EML_3: All 15 special functions D736-D750; D757 analytic comb
summary.new_theorem: T151: Atlas Batch 12 (S431): 30 special functions/combinatorics; total 775

verdicts.special_functions: All 15 special functions EML-3 (complex analytic continuation or oscillatory)
verdicts.combinatorics: Algebraic/matroids/species: EML-0; analytic comb: EML-3; Ramsey: EML-∞

key_theorem: Atlas Batch 12 (T151, S431): 30 special functions/combinatorics domains. Special functions (D736-D750): ALL EML-3 — every classical special function (Gamma, Bessel, hypergeometric, theta, modular, Airy, q-functions) is EML-3. Combinatorics: algebraic (symmetric functions, matroids): EML-0; analytic combinatorics (Flajolet): EML-3; Ramsey/van der Waerden: EML-∞. 0 violations. Total domains: 775.
rabbit_hole_log: All 15 classical special functions: EML-3 (complex analytic structure)
Multiple zeta values: EML-3 (nested complex sums, Goncharov motives)
Ramsey theory: EML-∞ (W(k,r) is Ackermann-level non-constructive)
NEW: T151 Atlas Batch 12 — 30 domains, 0 violations, total 775
